---
pagetitle: "CV | Alan J. Figueroa Ruiz"
toc: true
page-layout: full
---

::: {.page-hero}
# Curriculum Vitae

Academic background, research experience, teaching, outreach, skills, and professional development.
:::

::: {.section-block}

::: {.cv-download}
[Download full CV](files/Alan-Figueroa-Ruiz-CV.pdf){.button-primary}
:::

Place your CV PDF inside the `files/` folder and name it exactly:

`Alan-Figueroa-Ruiz-CV.pdf`

:::

::: {.section-block}

## Professional snapshot

::: {.gateway-grid}

::: {.gateway-card}
### Education

M.S. Biology student with a foundation in Animal Science, Natural Resources, Environmental Sociology, and Public Policy.
:::

::: {.gateway-card}
### Research

Wildlife disease ecology, One Health, conservation physiology, and environmental surveillance.
:::

::: {.gateway-card}
### Tools

R, RStudio, GitHub, Quarto, field metadata, molecular diagnostics, and reproducible workflows.
:::

::: {.gateway-card}
### Direction

Future DVM/PhD pathway integrating wildlife health, veterinary science, and conservation research.
:::

:::
:::

::: {.section-block}

## Academic profile

**Alan J. Figueroa Ruiz**  
M.S. Biology student  
University of Puerto Rico at Mayagüez  

Conservation agronomist interested in conservation physiology, wildlife medicine and disease ecology, reproductive biology, One Health, environmental health, and pathogen movement across human-modified landscapes.

:::

::: {.section-block}

## Research interests

::: {.tag-list}
<span>Conservation physiology</span>
<span>Wildlife medicine and disease ecology</span>
<span>Reproductive biology</span>
<span>One Health</span>
<span>Environmental diagnostics</span>
<span>Molecular diagnostics</span>
<span>Bioinformatics</span>
<span>Reproducible research</span>
<span>Community-based conservation</span>
:::

:::

::: {.section-block}

## Selected projects

- Manatee Project Puerto Rico
- Human *Toxoplasma gondii* Epidemiology in Puerto Rico
- Zebrafish ZF4 Cell Infection Model
- WildCiencia

:::
